articles.title: The most severe Linux threat to surface in years catches the world flat-footed - Ars Technica
articles.description: CopyFail threatens multi-tenant servers, CI/CD work flows, Kubernetes containers, and more.

articles.author: John Timmer
articles.title: Researchers try to cut the genetic code from 20 to 19 amino acids - Ars Technica
articles.description: Using AI tools, the team reworked part of the ribosome to need one less amino acid.

articles.author: Tim Fernholz
articles.title: Elon Musk testifies that xAI trained Grok on OpenAI models - TechCrunch
articles.description: "Distillation" is a hot topic as frontier labs try to prevent smaller competitors from copying their models.
articles.content:
OpenAI and Anthropic have been on the warpath lately against third-party efforts to train new AI models by prompting their publicly accessible chatbots and APIs, a process known as “distillation.”
